message:
fix(fr-command): SPOP count error wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-spopary]

SPOP with non-numeric or negative count now returns 'ERR value
is out of range, must be positive' (upstream t_set.c::spopCommand
wording) instead of the generic 'value is not an integer or out
of range'.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
